bullets: Monitored 20+ people at a time at the swimming pool for safety precautions.
Stayed alert and ready to respond to emergencies to maintain the safety of all.
Completed training to learn latest first aid and emergency action plan at pool.
Handled 200+ customers a day at the cashier counter for customer service.
Received certificate for Great Security & Vigilance which deterred bulk theft.
Provided all-round support at the store of 5000+ daily footfall of customers.
Participated in 5-day NCS programme for adventurous and challenging tasks.
Led a team of 3 to complete 90° vertical wall climb and Jacob's Ladder.
Received certification for successfully completing 15+ activities and tasks.
Assisted in teaching 7+ swimmers competitive skills required for races.
Collaborated with 3 instructors to teach and share best swimming practices.
Won Bronze medal at State Level Championship in India for 400m relay.
Won Bronze medal in 100m Backstroke; participated in 30+ competitions.
Competitive swimmer at County Level for Amersham Swim Club.

academics.title: Systems Engineering – Virtual Experience
bullets: Learned basics of planning and integration efficiency in engineering projects.
Completed the course of designing and collaborating so system works as one.

academics.title: Spring Pod – Virtual Experience
bullets: Learned basics of CAD to create and analyze design for research purposes.
Ran simulations to understand basics of design and development of a project.

statements.whyApprenticeship: I want to earn while I learn, building real-world skills alongside a qualification rather than accumulating debt. An apprenticeship gives me hands-on experience from day one in a field I'm passionate about.
statements.strengths: Calm under pressure (proven as a lifeguard), strong teamwork and leadership (NCS, swim coaching, DofE Gold), customer-facing experience, and a genuine passion for aviation and engineering.
statements.careerGoal: To become a pilot or secure a career in the aviation or aerospace field.
statements.extracurricular: Competitive swimmer (Bronze medals at state level, county-level for Amersham Swim Club). Volunteer swim coach as part of DofE Gold. NCS participant — led team through high-ropes challenges. Lifeguard since October 2024.
